description: Create the Phase 5 interaction and mock-state acceptance document shell.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-phase5-interaction-state-acceptance.md with headings for State Model, Derived State, Interaction Intents, Mock Scenarios, Window Wiring, Gesture Guards, Preview Evidence, and Non-Goals.
Add a one-sentence scope note that Phase 5 uses mock data and native interaction intents without real backend or real music provider integration.
Check that every heading is unique and the document opens from repository root.

description: Add Phase 5 acceptance rows for state and derived-state behavior.
steps: Add acceptance rows for authState, primaryMode, appDisplayMode, presentationState, forceCompactMode, hover, gesture, mode-switch, reminder, and greeting flags.
Add acceptance rows for hasMusicActivitySource, hasAppActivitySource, showMusicActivity, showAppActivity, showAnyActivity, isActivityVisualState, collapsedWidth, radius, and smoothness outputs.
Link each row to the Phase 5 section in 灵动岛迁移方案.md and to docs/mac-island-state-spec.md.

description: Add Phase 5 acceptance rows for mouse and trackpad interaction intents.
steps: Add acceptance rows for hover enter, hover leave, tap expand, tap collapse, pointer swipe compact/activity, trackpad vertical open/close, and trackpad horizontal music command intents.
Record the Windows baseline thresholds for tap, pointer swipe, trackpad horizontal, trackpad vertical, reset window, and cooldown window.
Link each row to docs/mac-island-interaction-spec.md and docs/mac-island-animation-spec.md.

description: Add native Phase 5 domain state types for mock-driven island behavior.
steps: Create a Phase 5 state model file under mac-island/MemoryFlowIsland/State/ for authState, primaryMode, appDisplayMode, presentationState, forceCompactMode, hover, gesture, animation, reminder, and greeting flags.
Include lightweight mock payload fields for review, todo, and music activity sources without adding real providers or API calls.
Check the full native Swift source set with swiftc typecheck.

description: Add native Phase 5 interaction intent types and gesture thresholds.
steps: Create an IslandInteractionIntent model with cases for hoverEnter, hoverLeave, tap, outsideCollapse, pointerSwipe, trackpadSwipe, horizontalMusicCommand, mockScenarioSelect, and transitionComplete.
Add threshold constants that mirror the documented Windows tap, pointer swipe, trackpad threshold, reset, and cooldown values.
Check that the model has no dependency on AppKit windows or SwiftUI views.

description: Add derived-state output for Phase 5 visual decisions.
steps: Create IslandDerivedState with booleans for music, app, review, todo, reminder, any-activity, and activity-visual branches.
Compute collapsed width, radius, smoothness, visual state, and content-width requirement from the mock domain state.
Check representative logged-out, logged-in review, todo, and music inputs with a lightweight Swift harness or typecheck-safe probe.

description: Create the Phase 5 presentation reducer shell.
steps: Create IslandPresentationReducer with an API that accepts current domain state and IslandInteractionIntent and returns the next domain state plus a transition reason.
Keep the reducer pure and free of window mutation, timers, menu objects, or real provider calls.
Check that unknown or no-op intents preserve state without changing visual output.

description: Implement logged-out and logged-in compact derivation in the Phase 5 reducer path.
steps: Map logged-out mock state to compact collapsed visual output with the documented signed-out width branch.
Map logged-in app/review compact state to compact collapsed visual output with the documented logged-in width branch.
Check derived-state probe rows for logged-out and logged-in review compact scenarios.

description: Implement app review and todo activity derivation for mock scenarios.
steps: Map logged-in review activity mock state to app activity visual output when forceCompactMode is false.
Map logged-in todo activity mock state to todo activity visual output when forceCompactMode is false.
Check derived-state probe rows for review activity, todo activity, and todo compact special-width scenarios.

description: Implement music activity derivation for mock takeover scenarios.
steps: Map mock music data plus primaryMode music to music activity visual output when forceCompactMode is false.
Keep the music branch independent from real MediaRemote, Apple Music, Spotify, or IPC provider code.
Check derived-state probe rows for music activity and music compact fallback scenarios.

description: Implement tap-driven expand and collapse transitions in the reducer.
steps: Make tap intent expand collapsed or activity states into the correct expanded app or expanded music presentation.
Make tap or collapse intent return expanded states to the correct collapsed or activity presentation based on activity-source availability.
Check a reducer probe sequence for compact to expanded to activity or compact recovery.

description: Implement hover enter and hover leave transitions in the reducer.
steps: Make hoverEnter set isHovered and produce hoverCollapsed only when the island is not expanded.
Make hoverLeave clear isHovered and preserve expanded presentation when the island is expanded.
Check reducer probe sequences for compact hover enter/leave and expanded hover leave.

description: Implement pointer swipe compact and activity transitions in the reducer.
steps: Map pointer swipe right to forceCompactMode true when an activity source is visible.
Map pointer swipe left to forceCompactMode false when an activity source exists and the island is compact.
Check reducer probe sequences for review activity collapse and compact activity restore.

description: Implement trackpad vertical open and close transitions in the reducer.
steps: Map trackpad swipe up to close expanded presentation or collapse activity presentation to compact.
Map trackpad swipe down to reopen activity from compact or expand activity presentation.
Check reducer probe sequences for expanded close, activity close, activity reopen, and activity expand.

description: Implement mock music horizontal trackpad command intents.
steps: Map horizontal trackpad intents to previous-track and next-track mock command outputs only when primaryMode is music.
Keep command output as mock reducer metadata instead of sending real media keys.
Check reducer probe rows for music horizontal swipe and app-mode ignored horizontal swipe.

description: Add reducer guards for gesture locks and animation locks.
steps: Add state fields or helper logic that blocks overlapping trackpad gestures during the cooldown window.
Add mode-switch and force-compact transition guards so repeated intents do not skip visual states.
Check rapid tap, hover, and trackpad probe sequences for stable target-state output.

description: Add reminder and paused-music mock timer intents without real timers.
steps: Add reducer intents that simulate reminder becoming due and paused music timeout completion.
Make reminder due open the app review activity path only when compact, app-mode, and not expanded.
Make paused music timeout return to app mode and clear mock music activity source in reducer output.

description: Create the Phase 5 mock scenario catalog.
steps: Create IslandMockScenario definitions for logged-out compact, logged-in review compact, logged-in todo compact, review activity, todo activity, music activity, expanded music, expanded app, reminder due, and paused music timeout scenarios.
Give every scenario a stable id, menu title, initial state, and expected derived visual state.
Check that the scenario catalog compiles without referencing backend or real music provider modules.

description: Create a Phase 5 state-machine probe for derived-state coverage.
steps: Extend or add a lightweight Swift probe that evaluates every mock scenario and writes derived visual state, width, mode, presentation, and activity booleans to docs/evidence/mac-island-phase5/.
Check that every required Phase 5 scenario appears exactly once in the generated JSON output.
Check that no generated row reports an unsupported visual state or missing width value.

description: Create a Phase 5 reducer probe for interaction sequence coverage.
steps: Add reducer sequence cases for hover enter/leave, tap expand/collapse, pointer compact/activity swipes, trackpad vertical swipes, horizontal music command, reminder due, paused timeout, and rapid retargeting.
Write sequence outputs under docs/evidence/mac-island-phase5/ as JSON or Markdown evidence.
Check that every sequence records initial state, intents, final state, visual state, and guard outcome.

description: Wire IslandWindowController to own Phase 5 domain state behind preview mode.
steps: Add a Phase 5 preview state container to IslandWindowController without removing the existing Phase 4 sizing and motion engine paths.
Map IslandDerivedState visual output into the existing resolvePreviewLayout and IslandMotionEngine request path.
Check that the native source set typechecks and compact startup still renders when Phase 5 preview mode is enabled.

description: Route tap interaction through the Phase 5 reducer in preview mode.
steps: Replace preview-only tap cycling with a reducer tap intent when Phase 5 preview mode is enabled.
Keep the old preview cycling path available only when Phase 5 preview mode is disabled or explicitly requested.
Check that tapping compact opens expanded and tapping or collapse intent returns to the expected state in a reducer-backed probe.

description: Route hover monitoring through the Phase 5 reducer in preview mode.
steps: Make IslandHoverMonitor callbacks send hoverEnter and hoverLeave intents to the Phase 5 reducer path.
Keep click-through disable and recovery tied to the derived hover or expanded state instead of direct preview-state checks.
Check that hover enter grows the compact shell and hover leave returns it without moving away from the notch.

description: Add native pointer drag classification for Phase 5 preview interactions.
steps: Add a small pointer gesture adapter that records pointer-down, pointer-move, and pointer-up horizontal deltas for the island view or panel.
Convert tap-sized movement into tap intent and swipe-sized movement into pointer swipe intents using the documented thresholds.
Check with a focused probe or manual preview path that drag right collapses activity and drag left restores activity.

description: Add native trackpad wheel classification for Phase 5 preview interactions.
steps: Add a wheel or scroll event adapter that accumulates deltaX and deltaY over the documented reset window.
Convert dominant vertical and horizontal movement into trackpad intents using the documented threshold and cooldown values.
Check that repeated wheel events during cooldown do not emit duplicate reducer intents.

description: Expose Phase 5 mock scenarios in the status menu.
steps: Add a preview-only Phase 5 Scenarios submenu gated by a clear environment flag.
Wire each scenario menu item to select the corresponding IslandMockScenario through the reducer path.
Check that selecting logged-out, review activity, todo activity, music activity, expanded music, and expanded app changes the visible shell state.

description: Expose Phase 5 interaction demo controls in the status menu.
steps: Add a preview-only Phase 5 Interactions submenu for hover enter, hover leave, tap, pointer swipe left, pointer swipe right, trackpad up, trackpad down, horizontal previous, and horizontal next intents.
Route every menu item through the same reducer path used by real preview interactions.
Check that menu-triggered interaction demos produce the same derived final states as reducer probe sequences.

description: Add minimal mock content markers so Phase 5 state changes are visible.
steps: Add lightweight preview-only labels or glyph markers for logged-out, review, todo, music, reminder, and gesture-lock states without implementing the full Phase 6 content layout.
Keep marker sizing inputs flowing through IslandContentWidthRequirement rather than directly resizing the window from the view layer.
Check that each mock scenario has a visibly distinct marker while the shell remains attached to the notch.

description: Connect Phase 5 content width requirements to mock derived state.
steps: Make derived state declare content width requirements for review, todo, music, greeting, and compact branches.
Feed the derived content width requirement into IslandWindowSizingEngine through the controller path.
Check that activity width changes with mock scenario requirements and remains centered around the notch.

description: Keep expanded collapse recovery tied to activity-source availability.
steps: When expanded app or music collapses, return to activity presentation if a mock activity source is still available.
When expanded logged-out or compact-only scenarios collapse, return to compact presentation.
Check reducer and visible preview paths for expanded music, expanded app, and logged-out collapse recovery.

description: Add Phase 5 motion-plan selection from reducer transition reasons.
steps: Map reducer transition reasons to existing IslandTransitionKind values for compact, activity, expanded, hover, and retarget paths.
Preserve Phase 4 motion tokens while making Phase 5 state transitions choose the correct motion path.
Check that tap, hover, pointer swipe, and trackpad swipe sequences each record the expected transition kind.

description: Add Phase 5 retarget handling for rapid mouse and gesture input.
steps: Allow a new reducer intent to retarget the in-flight presentation target without resetting to an old source state.
Keep hover leave, tap collapse, and trackpad close from fighting over stale animation locks.
Check rapid hover-tap-hover and tap-tap-trackpad reducer sequences for stable final state and no skipped root view update.

description: Capture Phase 5 scenario matrix evidence.
steps: Generate docs/evidence/mac-island-phase5/scenario-matrix.json from the Phase 5 scenario probe.
Confirm the matrix includes logged-out, review compact, todo compact, review activity, todo activity, music activity, expanded app, expanded music, reminder due, and paused timeout rows.
Check that every row includes domain state, derived state, visual state, width, and expected transition metadata.

description: Capture Phase 5 interaction sequence evidence.
steps: Generate docs/evidence/mac-island-phase5/interaction-sequences.json or Markdown from the reducer sequence probe.
Confirm the evidence covers hover, tap, pointer swipe, trackpad vertical, horizontal music, reminder, paused timeout, and rapid retargeting paths.
Check that guard outcomes are explicit for click-through, gesture lock, animation lock, and cooldown behavior.

description: Verify visible Phase 5 mock scenarios in the native preview host.
steps: Launch the native preview host with Phase 5 scenario controls enabled when the local environment supports it.
Select at least logged-out, review activity, todo activity, music activity, expanded app, and expanded music scenarios from the status menu.
Record whether each scenario visibly changes shell shape, marker content, and notch attachment, noting any environment limitation if physical capture is unavailable.

description: Verify visible Phase 5 mouse interactions in the native preview host.
steps: Launch the native preview host with Phase 5 interactions enabled when the local environment supports it.
Use real hover, tap, and pointer drag interactions on the island shell or the matching interaction menu fallbacks.
Record whether hover grows with shadow, tap expands or collapses, pointer swipes compact or restore activity, and the island stays attached to the notch.

description: Verify visible Phase 5 trackpad interactions in the native preview host.
steps: Launch the native preview host with Phase 5 interactions enabled when the local environment supports it.
Use real trackpad vertical and horizontal gestures on the island shell or the matching interaction menu fallbacks.
Record whether vertical swipes open, expand, close, or compact as expected and horizontal music gestures emit mock previous or next commands without breaking app mode.

description: Fill the Phase 5 acceptance document with state and reducer evidence links.
steps: Link scenario-matrix evidence and interaction-sequence evidence from docs/mac-island-phase5-interaction-state-acceptance.md.
Mark state, derived-state, and reducer rows as Passed only when the corresponding generated evidence exists.
Leave native runtime rows Prepared or Real-device pending if visible preview evidence is unavailable.

description: Fill the Phase 5 acceptance document with visible interaction evidence.
steps: Add links or notes for manual preview observations, screenshots, videos, or environment limitations for scenario, mouse, and trackpad visible checks.
Mark visible scenario and interaction rows according to the actual evidence captured by the e2e tasks.
Check that the document clearly distinguishes mock Phase 5 behavior from real provider or backend integration.

description: Update the migration checklist with Phase 5 state and interaction gates.
steps: Add Phase 5 checklist rows for state model, derived state, mock scenarios, mouse interactions, trackpad interactions, gesture guards, and visible preview evidence.
Link each row to docs/mac-island-phase5-interaction-state-acceptance.md and the generated evidence files.
Check that Phase 6 content migration and Phase 8 real music provider work remain explicitly out of scope.

description: Refresh the handoff notes after the Phase 5 queue is initialized.
steps: Update agent-state.md with Phase 5 as the current queue, the first pending task, and recommended startup files for state-machine and interaction work.
Add a concise codex-progress.md record that Phase 4 tasks were archived into feature_list_summary.json and Phase 5 tasks were generated.
Check that normal startup does not require reading codex-progress-archive.md.
